title: Conformance tests and spec cross-check: verify CCP-16 metrics, thresholds, CBOR structures across all impls vs spec/02a section 3.5
description: Add/update tests that run ccp16.json, ccp_tdma.json, ccp_load_balancing.json against Rust, Python, Zephyr. Check all tables in spec/02a (load metrics, thresholds, signaling formats). Fix any gaps. Include test vector generation updates if needed. Close when all pass identically.
